title: [BUG] TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'comments')
author: PavelDAS
body:
Server running at http://localhost:3000
Произошла ошибка: TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'comments')
    at c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\node_modules\exceljs\lib\xlsx\xform\sheet\worksheet-xform.js:465:60
    at Array.reduce (<anonymous>)
    at WorkSheetXform.reconcile (c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\node_modules\exceljs\lib\xlsx\xform\sheet\worksheet-xform.js:459:46)
    at c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\node_modules\exceljs\lib\xlsx\xlsx.js:137:22
    at Array.forEach (<anonymous>)
    at XLSX.reconcile (c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\node_modules\exceljs\lib\xlsx\xlsx.js:135:22)
    at XLSX.load (c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\node_modules\exceljs\lib\xlsx\xlsx.js:416:10)
    at async XLSX.readFile (c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\node_modules\exceljs\lib\xlsx\xlsx.js:58:24)
    at async Object.parse (c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\src\services\excelService.js:20:5)
    at async parseExcel (c:\xampp\htdocs\ex\src\controllers\excelController.js:9:22)

  "name": "@wmakeev/exceljs",
  "version": "4.4.5",

comments.author: ChandanChainani
comments.body: @PavelDAS Please can you share the example so it is easier to regenerate the issue
